title: polemonium californicum subsp. columbianum
intro: Polemonium californicum subsp. columbianum, also known as sky pilot or mountain sky pilot, is a plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Polemonium californicum subsp. columbianum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
